MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff
Mayer Saketkhou, Plaintiff
Terrance C. Heath, Esq. for Defendants
Thomas C. Leyson, Defendant

Settlement conference held. Case settled. The paries placed a written stipulation on the record as follows:
Defendant will vacate the premises located at 1030 York St , SF, CA by 3/1/04
Defendant shall tender to Plaintiff the following moneys: $212 by 1/15/04 and $806 by 2/1/04.
If defendant vacates said premises by 3/1/04. Plaintiff shall file a dismissal with prejudice.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Court Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Beldon Yee
